Description
io.joshuasalcedo.os.domain.network
Network value objects and the OSNetworkObject sealed interface.

    Class
    Description
    enum 
    ConnectionState
    TCP connection states as defined by RFC 793.
    final record 
    DnsConfiguration
    Value object representing DNS resolver configuration.
    final record 
    InternetProtocolStats
    Value object representing aggregate TCP/UDP protocol statistics.
    final record 
    ListeningPort
    Value object representing a port that is actively listening for connections.
    final record 
    NetworkRoute
    Value object representing a network routing table entry.
    final record 
    NetworkSnapshot
    Aggregate value object representing a point-in-time network state capture.
    final record 
    PublicIpInfo
    Value object representing public IP geolocation information (e.g.
    final record 
    SocketAddress
    Value object representing an IP address and port combination.
    final record 
    TcpConnection
    Value object representing an active TCP connection.
    enum 
    TransportProtocol
    Transport-layer protocol type.
    final record 
    UdpConnection
    Value object representing a UDP listener/endpoint.
